name: @flyfish-group/file-viewer-workspace
description: Flyfish File Viewer demo, documentation, and package workspace

scripts.type-check:wrappers: pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web type-check && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react type-check && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer type-check && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte type-check
scripts.build:wrapper-packages: pnpm build-lib-only && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer3 build && pnpm --filter file-viewer3 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/web build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-web build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer-react build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/react-legacy build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.7 build && pnpm --filter @flyfish-group/file-viewer build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue2.6 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/jquery build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/svelte build
scripts.verify:browser-smoke: pnpm build:wrapper-demo && pnpm verify:demo-browser-smoke && pnpm verify:wrapper-browser-smoke
scripts.verify:migration-gates: pnpm type-check && pnpm build-only && pnpm docs:build && pnpm verify:format-support && pnpm verify:ecosystem-checklist && pnpm verify:ecosystem-readmes && pnpm verify:smoke-matrix && pnpm verify:experience-baseline && pnpm verify:branch-roles && pnpm verify:core-api && pnpm verify:core-framework-neutral && pnpm wrappers:verify --source-only && pnpm verify:wrapper-api && pnpm verify:wrapper-options && pnpm verify:compatibility-api && pnpm verify:compatibility-readmes && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && pnpm verify:ecosystem-tarballs && pnpm release:ecosystem:list
scripts.deploy:cloudflare: pnpm build-only && pnpm verify:demo-output && node scripts/deploy-cloudflare-pages.mjs
scripts.release:wrappers:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --pack-dir .release/wrappers
scripts.release:wrappers:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.release:ecosystem:build: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm build:viewer-assets && pnpm build:wrapper-packages && pnpm obfuscate && pnpm wrappers:export && pnpm verify:production-entrypoints
scripts.release:ecosystem:pack: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --pack --clean
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish:dry-run: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish --dry-run
scripts.release:ecosystem:publish: pnpm release:ecosystem:build && pnpm verify:ecosystem-versions && node scripts/release-ecosystem-packages.mjs --publish
scripts.wrappers:export: pnpm wrappers:readme && node scripts/sync-wrapper-repos.mjs && pnpm wrappers:verify
scripts.wrappers:standalone-smoke: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/core build && pnpm build:wrapper-packages && pnpm wrappers:export && node scripts/verify-wrapper-standalone-builds.mjs
scripts.release:pack: pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 type-check && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 build && pnpm --filter @file-viewer/vue3 pack
